name: The Mountain Man
description:
Suit Shield (Con)

Alignment chaotic neutral

The Mountain Man represents creatures with incredible physical power. As long as you have The Mountain Man invested, it grants you a +2 item bonus to Athletics checks to Force Open, Grapple, Shove, or Trip. This increases to a +3 item bonus if you are at least 17th level.

Activate (2 Actions) command, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You bring the might of the mountain into your body. You cast 2nd-rank or 4th-rank Enlarge upon yourself. If you're at least 15th level, the duration increases to 1 hour.
